name: Cha Hae-In
title: Pure Sword Princess

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Shadow Blade
basic.description: Hae-In swiftly attacks with Heavenly Swords across three stages, dealing Water elemental damage.

core.name: Sword Princess's Dance
core.description: Hae-In controls the Heavenly swords, slashing at enemies without mercy. Inflicts Airborne on final hit.

skill.name: Heavenly Strike
skill.description: Hae-In leaps and delivers a powerful downward strike with nearby slash. Applies Airborne on hit and Knock Down on final hit.

skill.name: Swordstorm
skill.description: After slicing enemies in her Sword Princess zone with blinding speed, Hae-In commands Heavenly Swords to strike simultaneously. Grants Super Armor during use. Applies Airborne and Unrecoverable (30s).

support.name: Victory Strike
support.description: Spinning quick attack followed by powerful downward strike. Applies Airborne on hit, Knock Down and Unrecoverable on final hit. Activates Sword Princess's Oath (+5% damage, +10% Water damage, 15s).

qte.name: Sword of Judgement
qte.description: Hae-In summons massive Heavenly Swords from the sky, delivering a powerful strike. Triggers via Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate, Stun, or Blind. Applies Knock Down and activates Sword Princess's Oath.

ultimate.name: Sword of Destiny
ultimate.description: A sword made of pure light cuts through the sky as Hae-In charges through enemy lines. Applies Knock Down on final hit.

passive.name: Will of the Sword
passive.description: When Sword Princess's Dance or Heavenly Swords hit, they activate Heavenly Swords (0.5s cooldown). Using Sword Princess's Dance or Heavenly Strike recharges Will of the Sword gauge (max 6 stacks, 15s): Defense +5%, Critical Hit Rate +2%, Critical Hit Damage +2% per stack. Each Heavenly Sword blade deals 175% DEF Water damage.

advancements: Swordstorm becomes Quick Attack: Swordstorm (+60% damage). Heavenly Strike activates Blade Master (Core Attack transforms to Dance of Scattered Blades with Super Armor, no Core Gauge consumption, 5s). Will of the Sword enhanced to Defense +10% per level.
Heavenly Strike applies Unrecoverable (30s). Sword of Destiny applies Paralyze (3s interrupt duration).
At 100% Will of the Sword gauge, activates Sword's Resolve (6s). Heavenly Strike becomes Heavy Attack: Heavenly Strike (+170% damage). Consumes Will of the Sword gauge upon duration end.
Per Water team member (max 3 stacks): Critical Hit Rate +7%, Critical Hit Damage +7%. In Guild Boss mode, stacks once per ally with no limit.

Will of the Sword enhanced: Defense +10%, Critical Rate +4%, Critical Damage +4% per level (max 6 stacks). Pure Sword Princess effect on stage entry: Sword of Destiny damage +60%, Heavenly Strike and Heavy Attack damage +60%, infinite duration.
